care.summary: Popular easy-care houseplant with distinctive umbrella-shaped leaves; tolerates some neglect.
care.light: Bright indirect light to partial shade
care.water: Moderate; let top inch of soil dry between waterings
care.fertilizer: Balanced liquid fertilizer monthly in spring and summer
care.toxicity: Mildly toxic to pets and humans if ingested (contains calcium oxalate crystals)
common_issues: Dropping leaves from overwatering or cold drafts
Spider mites in dry indoor air
tips: Rotate pot weekly for even growth
Prune to shape and encourage bushier growth
Can be grown outdoors in zones 10-12
